# MAMP dependencies (from upstream README + Assembly extensions)
# Python 3.8 is recommended by upstream.

# Core DL stack (CPU wheels by default; see CUDA note below)
torch==1.8.1
torchvision==0.9.1

# Upstream-pinned libs
timm==0.3.2
tensorboard==2.9.0
numpy==1.22.4
scikit-learn==1.1.1
tqdm==4.64.0

# Runtime deps imported in training/tools
PyYAML==6.0.2
Pillow==9.5.0

# Needed by SplineEqNet preprocessing path used by tools/export_assembly_for_mamp.py
scipy==1.10.1

# CUDA 11.1 wheels (alternative install):
# pip install --extra-index-url https://download.pytorch.org/whl/cu111 torch==1.8.1+cu111 torchvision==0.9.1+cu111
